title: Front Office Manager - Compass Group India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Compass Group India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
Compass Group India is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Gurgaon. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Compass Group India:
Compass Group India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage reservations and optimize room revenue through yield management
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Ensure compliance with FSSAI, health, and safety regulations
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Deliver exceptional guest experiences in line with brand standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in MICE

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Flexible working hours
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gurgaon, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Compass Group India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
